inputs.label: Body Weight
inputs.businessContext: User's body weight in kilograms. Used to compute energy expenditure.

businessContext_i18n.en: User's body weight in kilograms. Used to compute energy expenditure.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kullanıcının kilogram cinsinden vücut ağırlığı. Enerji harcamasını hesaplamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Körpergewicht des Benutzers in Kilogramm. Wird zur Berechnung des Energieverbrauchs verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids corporel de l'utilisateur en kilogrammes. Utilisé pour calculer la dépense énergétique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso corporal del usuario en kilogramos. Se utiliza para calcular el gasto energético.
businessContext_i18n.ar: وزن جسم المستخدم بالكيلوغرام. يُستخدم لحساب إنفاق الطاقة.

inputs.label: Duration
inputs.businessContext: Total time spent jumping rope in minutes.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total time spent jumping rope in minutes.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps total passé à sauter à la corde en minutes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo total dedicado a saltar la cuerda en minutos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي الوقت المستغرق في القفز بالحبل بالدقائق.

inputs.label: Jumps per Minute
inputs.businessContext: Average number of rope skips per minute. Influences intensity (MET).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average number of rope skips per minute. Influences intensity (MET).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dakika başına ortalama ip atlama sayısı. Yoğunluğu (MET) etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Anzahl von Seilsprüngen pro Minute. Beeinflusst die Intensität (MET).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre moyen de sauts à la corde par minute. Influence l'intensité (MET).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número promedio de saltos de cuerda por minuto. Influye en la intensidad (MET).
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط عدد قفزات الحبل في الدقيقة. يؤثر على شدة التمرين (MET).

inputs.label: Efficiency Factor
inputs.businessContext: Individual fitness variation multiplier (1.0 = average, >1 = higher calorie burn).

businessContext_i18n.en: Individual fitness variation multiplier (1.0 = average, >1 = higher calorie burn).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bireysel fitness değişim çarpanı (1.0 = ortalama, >1 = daha yüksek kalori yakımı).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur de variation individuelle de la condition physique (1,0 = moyenne, >1 = brûlure calorique plus élevée).
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador de variación individual de condición física (1.0 = promedio, >1 = mayor quema de calorías).
businessContext_i18n.ar: مضاعف التباين الفردي في اللياقة البدنية (1.0 = متوسط، >1 = حرق سعرات حرارية أعلى).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
